command:
import os
from PIL import Image
path = os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), 'Desktop', 'restaurant_banner.png')
if os.path.exists(path):
    img = Image.open(path)
    size_bytes = os.path.getsize(path)
    size_kb = size_bytes / 1024
    print(f'File exists: YES')
    print(f'Path: {path}')
    print(f'Dimensions: {img.size[0]}x{img.size[1]}')
    print(f'Mode: {img.mode}')
    print(f'Format: {img.format}')
    print(f'Size: {size_bytes} bytes ({size_kb:.1f} KB)')
    print(f'DPI: {img.info.get("dpi", "Not set")}')
else:
    print(f'ERROR: File not found at {path}')
description: التحقق من الصورة المُنشأة - حجمها وأبعادها ومسارها
